m({},{[i(887498+-868320)]=P;[i(-763342-(-782600))]=v,[i(-725116+744255)]=function()return-474721+1876822 end})end end,function(v,i)local c=G(i)local o=function(o,m,j,w,N)return L(v,{o,m;j;w;N},i,c)end return o end,{}return(C(-965430+5730332,{}))(c(N))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[i(-551754+571097)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
